import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import useReveal from '../hooks/useReveal'; import './Home.css'; const OPERATIONS = [ { icon: '🍌', title: 'Banana Cultivation', desc: 'Large-scale banana growing — the backbone of our value-addition chain, from fresh fruit to juice and wine.' }, { icon: '☕', title: 'Coffee Farming', desc: 'High-quality coffee cultivation using modern agronomy that maximises yield and market value.' }, { icon: '🐷', title: 'Piggery', desc: 'Commercial pig rearing integrated into our nutrient cycle, contributing income and organic fertiliser.' }, { icon: '🐓', title: 'Poultry Keeping', desc: 'Free-range and commercial poultry for eggs and meat, supplying local and regional markets.' }, { icon: '🍷', title: 'Banana Wine & Juice', desc: 'Value-added banana juice and wine from yellow bananas — reducing post-harvest losses and creating premium products.' }, { icon: '🌱', title: 'Demo & Learning Centre', desc: 'Hosting farmers, students, and partners for hands-on training in smart, climate-resilient agriculture.' }, ]; const STATS = [ { num: '5+', label: 'Core Operations' }, { num: '100%', label: 'Sustainable Practices' }, { num: '2+', label: 'Value-Added Products' }, { num: '∞', label: 'Community Impact' }, ]; export default function Home() { useReveal(); /* Hero text animation on mount */ useEffect(() => { const els = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-animate'); els.forEach((el, i) => { setTimeout(() => el.classList.add('hero-animate--in'), 100 + i * 130); }); }, []); return ( <> {/* ── HERO ── */}

Smart Agriculture

An integrated agribusiness combining modern technology, sustainable farming, and community empowerment in the heart of Acholi land.

🌍

Uganda-Based, World-Class

Proving that world-class agribusiness can thrive right here in Northern Uganda.

♻️

Integrated & Sustainable

Each operation feeds the next — crops, livestock, value addition, and community, all connected.

🤝

Community First

Skills training, empowerment sessions, and job creation for farmers and youth in Lira District.

🔬

Smart Technology

Climate-smart agriculture and modern techniques that improve yields while protecting the environment.

Est. Amach Town Council
Lira District, Uganda

Who We Are

Built on the soil of innovation and purpose

Ayach Smart Farm is an innovative, integrated agribusiness dedicated to sustainable food production, value addition, and community empowerment. We combine modern agriculture and technologies to optimise productivity and promote environmental conservation.

The farm also serves as a learning and demonstration centre supporting local farmers through skills development, agribusiness training, and job creation.

Vision
To become a leading model of sustainable and technology-driven integrated farming in Uganda and beyond.
Mission
To produce high-quality agricultural products through smart farming, value addition and community empowerment.
Learn More About Us →
{/* ── OPERATIONS ── */}

Empowering the community
